name: Go / NoGo
description: Response inhibition: frequent Go stimuli and infrequent NoGo stimuli requiring withheld response
citations: Smith, J. L., Johnstone, S. J., & Barry, R. J. (2008). Movement-related potentials in the Go/NoGo task: The P3-like ERP and modulating subjects' performance. Neuropsychologia, 46(1), 222-233.
